# HiRey People

> Canonical, consented, video-backed people pages for HiRey's trusted connector network.

## Data endpoints
- [People JSON](https://people.hirey.ai/data/people.json): public people records with canonical URLs, Hi profile URLs, and video metadata.
- [JSON Feed](https://people.hirey.ai/feed.json): recently added people pages.
- [Sitemap](https://people.hirey.ai/sitemap.xml): crawlable index of people pages.

## Pages
- [Walter Wu](https://people.hirey.ai/p/walter-wu): Founder of HiRey, building an agent-amplified trusted connector network
- [Zubair Zafar](https://people.hirey.ai/p/zubair-zafar): Full-stack engineer and AI builder looking for an autonomous product role in San Francisco
- [Curtis Chen](https://people.hirey.ai/p/curtis-chen): UCSD cognitive science graduate and Startup Incubator community builder
